rule_metadata.author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: New User Created Via Net.EXE With Never Expire Option

rules.rule_text:
title: New User Created Via Net.EXE With Never Expire Option
id: b9f0e6f5-09b4-4358-bae4-08408705bd5c
related:
- id: cd219ff3-fa99-45d4-8380-a7d15116c6dc
  type: derived
status: test
description: Detects creation of local users via the net.exe command with the option
  "never expire"
references:
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/07/11/select-xmrig-from-sqlserver/
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-07-12
modified: 2023-02-21
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1136.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
  - Image|endswith:
    - \net.exe
    - \net1.exe
  - OriginalFileName:
    - net.exe
    - net1.exe
  selection_cli:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - user
    - add
    - expires:never
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unlikely
level: high
